Broker Confidentiality Agreement

§ 01Parties
Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
{{brokerName}}
{{companyName}}
§ 02Confidential Information

"Confidential Information" means any non-public information shared by Forhemit with the Broker in connection with a potential ESOP transaction or referral opportunity, including but not limited to:

A.The identity of any business owner, company, or management team introduced by Forhemit
B.Financial data, EBITDA figures, revenue, margins, or quality-of-earnings materials
C.Deal structure, pricing, terms, timeline, or negotiation status
D.Any documents, models, analyses, or correspondence prepared by or for Forhemit
E.The existence of any discussions or negotiations between Forhemit and the company
§ 03Obligations

The Broker agrees to the following:

A.No disclosure of seller identity. The Broker shall not disclose the name, location, or identity of any company or owner introduced by Forhemit to any third party without prior written consent.
B.No competitive sharing. The Broker shall not share deal details, financial data, or opportunity information with competing brokers, advisors, or acquirers.
C.Purpose limitation. Confidential Information may be used only for the specific deal opportunity described and for no other purpose.
D.Standard of care. The Broker shall protect Confidential Information with at least the same degree of care used for its own confidential information, and in no event less than reasonable care.
§ 04Referral Terms

If the Broker refers a deal opportunity to Forhemit that results in a completed ESOP transaction:

{{referralFeePct}} of Forhemit's gross advisory fee
Within 10 business days of Forhemit's fee receipt at closing
Referral must be documented in writing before the company signs an engagement letter with Forhemit
Note: Referral fees are paid only on deals that close. No fee is owed on opportunities that do not result in a completed transaction.
§ 05Term

This agreement remains in effect for {{term}} from the date above. The confidentiality obligations in §03 survive expiration of this agreement with respect to any Confidential Information received during the term.

§ 06Permitted Disclosures
A.Broker's own clients. The Broker may share summary information with its own clients only with Forhemit's prior written approval and only to the extent necessary to evaluate a potential introduction.
B.Legal requirement. The Broker may disclose Confidential Information if required by law, regulation, or court order, provided the Broker gives Forhemit prompt written notice to allow Forhemit to seek protective relief.
§ 07Return of Materials

Upon written request by Forhemit or upon termination of any deal discussions, the Broker shall promptly return or destroy all Confidential Information in its possession, including copies, notes, and summaries. The Broker shall certify destruction in writing upon request.

§ 08Contact

For questions about this agreement, please contact:

deals@forhemit.com
